summary: The diff implements brand name updates from the old store name to 'Helping Hand' across frontend and backend files. REQ-13 is well-covered: Header logo alt text, Footer brand name, index.html page title, About page, Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, WhyChooseUs component, FAQ, Contact, and Return Policy pages all reference 'Helping Hand'. REQ-14 is addressed via a storeName = 'Helping Hand' constant in backend/main.mo. The tagline 'Smart Products. Smart Living.' is preserved. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were found.
